title: Runaway Smartphone
overview: Three teenagers are trying to raise money for the treatment of a child. While hunting for buried treasure, a magic Smartphone propels them into the past, amidst fearful forest people. They meet with adventures and life-threatening dangers. While returning to the present, they happen to take two of the natives and their adventures continue together.
